title: prunus spinosa var. fruticans
intro: Prunus spinosa var. fruticans, commonly known as dwarf blackthorn or wild cherry, is a compact shrub species of the Prunus spinosa plant. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's bark, leaves, and fruit are used to make herbal preparations that can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, offering a range of health benefits. Herbal preparations of Prunus spinosa var. fruticans can be taken as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
